title: User on Monday.com can join up to 120 teams. Can the limit be increased?
excerpt: User on Monday.com can join up to 120 teams. Can the limit be increased?

posts.author: pushpendra2010 (Pushpendra)
posts.cookedHtml: User on Monday.com can join up to 120 teams. Can the limit be increased?

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: I am running into a critical issue with this. We have standardized, templated boards for each of our Operations projects. These boards are administered by an Admin. Inherently when an Admin creates the teams the Admin is made Owner of, and thus a member of, these teams. We have just hit the max, so learning that the teams count includes sub-teams. This is creating a huge rate limiting issue for us.
